impact: This advances the PP&D plan by making autonomous daemon recovery fail closed: a paused daemon can be checked against deterministic fixtures before any autonomous work resumes, without live crawl, DevHub automation, or private artifact writes.
summary: Adds a fixture-only PP&D daemon circuit-breaker status scenario and validator covering paused state quarantine, restart eligibility, and source-safe recovery boundaries.
target_task: Task checkbox-449: Add a fixture-only circuit-breaker status scenario proving paused daemon state records quarantine, restart eligibility, and source-safe recovery boundaries before autonomous work resumes.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
